allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const src=fs.readFileSync\('src/pages/ErrorAnalysisPage.js','utf8'\); console.log\('lines:', src.split\(/\\n/\).length\); console.log\('has trailing newline:', src.endsWith\('\\n'\)\); console.log\('console.log count:', \(src.match\(/console\\\\.log/g\)||[]\).length\); console.log\('console.warn count:', \(src.match\(/console\\\\.warn/g\)||[]\).length\);")
